verdict_text: The article misleads readers through systematic selective and incorrect citations.
key_findings: FABRICATED CITATION: The article attributes a quote to the Shuowen Jiezi that does not exist in the original text
UNVERIFIED CAUSAL CLAIM: The motivation for adding female radicals is presented as fact without evidence
MISLEADING COMPARISON: Ancient entertainers compared to modern arts troupes while ignoring degraded caste status
SELECTIVE EVIDENCE: Counter-examples are completely omitted
nuance: The underlying phenomenon (semantic degradation of some female-radical characters) has cross-linguistic academic support. The article failure is methodological, not topical.
consensus_level: UNANIMOUS across all 6 anonymous participants by Round 6
